title: Fujitora Arrives in Dressrosa
description: Pages 1–4 focus on fujitora arrives in dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Bartolomeo, Colosseum Fighters, Doflamingo, Franky, Fujitora, Jesus Burgess, Unknown person #1 as the Navy presence grows when Admiral Fujitora enters Dressrosa, while the tournament and Doflamingo’s schemes continue to tighten.

dialogue.speaker: Jesus Burgess
dialogue.text: BURGESS !!!

dialogue.speaker: Jesus Burgess
dialogue.text: BURGESS !!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Scene 1: Corrida Colosseum

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Blackbeard's Pirate Crew, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WHAT INSANE STRENETH....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I thought that Luffy would have no problem winning a tournament like this, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Looks like there might be some unexpectedly rough fights ahead... it'd be best if we could avoid revealing his identity, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Anyway, I'll go ahead and get to work...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: YAYA!? PLEASE WAIT! I WILL GO AS WELL!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Like I said before, stop getting in the way!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: I've got not use for someone who doesn't know where the factory is!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: I need to find the highest ranking Doflamingo family member around

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: and beat the info out of him...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: PLEASE! PLEASE WAIT!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What do you want !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Let's change lo- citations!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We can't talk about something that import- tant around here! It's taboo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What are you talking about?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Same location: Audience seating

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The "pirate Mercury" Hillbeen

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: And Gabia the missionary ....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Yeah... all sorts of guys showing up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So we've decided on requesting reinforce-ments...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: to think it would come to this...

dialogue.speaker: Jesus Burgess
dialogue.text: I was also surprised at Burgess' presence...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: In one corner of the colosseum's waiting room

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: I'll confirm with Issho- San shortly

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Roger.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Yo, Yo, mister!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Talking to your- self?

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Bartolomeo pirate crew staff officer Gambia the 'Misdomary

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: you... might you be communicating with someone on the outside?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: "A bit suspicious, no? ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Sneakily trying to make those cool guys you named famous!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ha ha ha ha ha! ...taking some notes, there?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What's going on?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You... are you ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Click

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'll call back in 10 minutes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Toilets/ garbage dump

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: My apologies. I've taken care of the problem ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Splash splash

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ah, Gambia the missionary, who I mentioned before...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Fighter 0429: Cajumout

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Bartolomeo's man...

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: Marine HQ Vice Admiral: MayNard The Pursuer

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Go ahead and forget about him... I must have been seeing things
